project_name: DFlash vs Existing Spec-Dec Baseline Harness

decision.recommended_next_action: Finalize this comparison harness; only run a larger MATH-500 replicate if the controller needs to resolve the one-item quality caveat.
decision.stop_reason: DFlash beats the simplest available speculative baseline by 1.60x-3.73x throughput with zero request failures and acceptable documented memory/integration overhead, so the kill condition is not met.

recommended_next_action: Finalize this comparison harness; only run a larger MATH-500 replicate if the controller needs to resolve the one-item quality caveat.
run_notes_tail: - `scripts/compare_spec_baselines.py` to combine previous target-only/DFlash summaries with this project’s n-gram summaries.

- Ran the new n-gram prompt-lookup speculative baseline with Qwen/Qwen3-4B, vLLM `flash_attn`, `--max-num-batched-tokens 8192`, concurrency 4, max_new_tokens 256. All four datasets completed with 0 request failures, and the helper vLLM server was stopped before yielding.
- New n-gram quality/throughput results:
- chat n=32: quality 1.000, 102.16 completion tok/s, p95 9.83s.
- GSM8K n=64: quality 0.875, 123.25 completion tok/s, p95 7.58s.
- MATH-500 n=40: quality 0.275, 129.99 completion tok/s, p95 9.07s.
- MBPP-local n=24: quality 1.000, 99.07 completion tok/s, p95 3.47s.
- Combined comparison against the parent DFlash quality results (`results/spec_baseline_comparison.json`, summarized in `results/spec_baseline_report.md`):
- chat: DFlash 163.44 tok/s vs n-gram 102.16 tok/s = 1.60x, equal quality.
- GSM8K: DFlash 315.35 tok/s vs n-gram 123.25 tok/s = 2.56x, equal quality.
- MATH-500: DFlash 420.90 tok/s vs n-gram 129.99 tok/s = 3.24x, DFlash quality 0.250 vs n-gram 0.275 (one-item / 2.5pp small-sample caveat).
- MBPP-local: DFlash 369.82 tok/s vs n-gram 99.07 tok/s = 3.73x, equal quality.
- Memory / complexity evidence from vLLM logs:
- target-only: model load 7.5 GiB, available KV cache 97.93 GiB, GPU KV cache 713,088 tokens.
- n-gram: model load 7.5 GiB, available KV cache 97.29 GiB, GPU KV cache 708,416 tokens; no extra draft weights and lowest integration complexity.
- DFlash: model load 8.55 GiB, available KV cache 96.14 GiB, GPU KV cache 614,704 tokens; requires DFlash draft model and config, but remains a single vLLM speculative-config once weights are cached.
- Verification: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py` passed; `ps` showed no remaining vLLM/SGLang helper server after the run.
## Scientific decision

DFlash beats the simplest available existing speculative baseline (vLLM n-gram prompt lookup) by far more than the 10% kill threshold on all four tested prompt sets, with equal measured quality on three of four and a one-item MATH-500 caveat. Because this project’s purpose was specifically to prevent overvaluing DFlash without a simpler-spec baseline, the new harness and n-gram run materially strengthen the positive case while documenting DFlash’s moderate integration/memory overhead.
## 2026-04-14 resume/finalization audit
- Reviewed existing run notes, decision artifact, result report, and comparison JSON; the prior run already completed the unified harness and n-gram baseline benchmark.
- Added final decision artifacts that explicitly include target-only, n-gram, and DFlash columns in one table:
- `results/final_decision_summary.md`
- `artifacts/final_decision_audit.json`
- Final audit result: DFlash speedup versus the simplest existing speculative baseline (`ngram`) ranges from 1.60x to 3.73x, comfortably above the required 1.10x kill-condition threshold.
- Quality is unchanged versus n-gram on chat, GSM8K, and MBPP; MATH-500 has a -0.025 DFlash delta (one item in n=40), retained as a caveat but not a latency/integration kill.
- Verification refreshed: `python3 -m py_compile scripts/*.py` passed; no project vLLM/SGLang/llama helper inference processes were left running.
- Decision remains `finalize_positive`; no successor branch is warranted unless a controller explicitly wants a larger MATH-500 replicate.
- `scripts/compare_spec_baselines.py` to combine previous target-only/DFlash summaries with this project’s n-gram summaries.

- MBPP-local: DFlash 369.82 tok/s vs n-gram 99.07 tok/s = 3.73x, equal quality.
- Memory / complexity evidence from vLLM logs:
